LESSON PLAN
Subject: Mathematics | Class: PRIMARY_5 | Board: UBEC

Objective: By the end of this lesson, students will be able to create the key concepts in Mathematics as specified by the UBEC curriculum.

Activity: Students work in groups of four. Each group receives a scenario card based on a familiar Nigerian context. They must create the relevant concept and present their findings to the class. Names used: Chidi, Fatima, Ngozi, Aminu, Taiwo, Adaeze.

Assessment: Exit quiz of five questions. Students scoring below 40% receive guided practice. Marks allocated per UBEC continuous assessment guidelines.
reference:
Lesson Plan: Mathematics | UBEC | PRIMARY_5
Objective: Students will design key concepts in Mathematics.
Activity: Guided class exercise with Nigerian context examples.
Assessment: Short quiz to check understanding.
